nasb.text: “For this reason the kingdom of heaven may be compared to a king who wished to settle accounts with his slaves.

esv.text: “Therefore the kingdom of heaven may be compared to a king who wished     to settle accounts with his servants.

cnv.text: 因此，天國好像一個王，要和他的僕人算帳，

ccb.text: “因此，天国就像一个王，他要跟奴仆清算债务。

csbs.text: 为此，天国就好比一个君王，要与他的奴仆们清算账目。
